rag_rules: Preserve the AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component type or implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers from the current model or explicit declarations within the annex block
generic_rules: Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Ground every AGREE variable in the current AADL model or an explicit declaration
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when referring to component ports
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in implementation annexes when referring to component ports
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
